questions.content: 「橡皮擦」对应的英文单词是______。
Which one do you use to draw a straight line?

读下列内容并选出正确答案：
『dictionary, dictionary』

读下列内容并选出正确答案：
『notebook, n-o-t-e-b-o-o-k, notebook』
Choose the odd one out（找出与其他不同类的词）.
questions.explanation: A/B/C 都是书写/绘画工具，eraser 是擦除工具，类别不同。

questions.content: 「姑姑/阿姨」对应的英文是？ 拼写：______
questions.explanation: aunt = 姑姑/阿姨/姨妈/伯母（女性长辈）。

questions.content: 「堂兄弟/表姐妹」用一个英文词表示是______。
questions.explanation: cousin 表堂/表兄弟姐妹，男女同形。

questions.content: He is a ______ . He helps sick people in the hospital.
questions.explanation: 在医院帮助病人的是 doctor（医生）。

questions.content:
读下列内容并选出正确答案：
『cousin, cousin』
「农民」的英文是______。
「早餐」的英文是______。
What do we usually have at noon?
「刷牙」的英文短语是 brush my ______。
questions.explanation: brush teeth = 刷牙，复数 teeth。

questions.content:
读下列内容并选出正确答案：
『get up, get up, it means to rise from bed』
She ______ her face every morning.
questions.explanation: she 第三人称单数，every morning 一般现在时，washes。

questions.content: 「晚餐」的英文是______。
「葡萄」的英文是______。
questions.explanation: grape = 葡萄（一颗），葡萄串 grapes。

questions.content: Which one is a drink? 拼写：______
「西瓜」的英文是______。

读下列内容并选出正确答案：
『noodles, I like noodles for lunch』
Mom is making a cup of ______ for me.
questions.explanation: a cup of 后接饮料，tea 茶。

questions.content: 「冰淇淋」的英文是 ice ______。
「长颈鹿」的英文是______。
Which animal lives in the ocean?
「老虎」的英文是______。

读下列内容并选出正确答案：
『elephant, the big elephant』
Roses, lilies and tulips are all kinds of ______.
questions.explanation: 玫瑰、百合、郁金香都是花。

questions.content: 复数形式：one sheep, two ______.
「地铁」的英文是______。
questions.explanation: subway = 地铁；underground 是英式说法。

questions.content: We borrow books from the ______.
「机场」的英文是______。

读下列内容并选出正确答案：
『I am going to the zoo with my family this Sunday』
How do you go to school? — By ______. （骑自行车）
Which one is NOT a kind of transport?
questions.explanation: zebra（斑马）是动物，不是交通工具。

questions.content: 「十二」的英文是______。
Which is the first day of a week (in English habits)?
questions.explanation: 英语习惯里星期日是一周第一天。

questions.content: 九月份的英文是______。

读下列内容并选出正确答案：
『Today is May the seventh, two thousand and twenty-six』
questions.explanation: 录音读 May 7th（5 月 7 日）。

questions.content: 20th 用英文写作 ______.
We have a music lesson on ______ . （星期三）
「紫色」的英文是______。
The sun is ______ and round.
「圆形」的英文是______。

读下列内容并选出正确答案：
『brown, brown like chocolate』
A ______ has three sides.（三角形有三条边）
Which color do you get by mixing red and yellow? 拼写：______

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-be动词
questions.content: Tom and Jack ______ good friends.

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-be动词
questions.content: There ______ a book and two pens on the desk.
questions.explanation: There be 句型就近原则，a book 单数。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-be动词
questions.content: I ______ a student. My sister ______ a teacher.

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-be动词
questions.content: 填空：The cats ______ in the garden.（用 be 的正确形式）

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-be动词
questions.content: He is at home. 改否定（不缩写）：He ______ at home.

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-be动词
questions.content: My brother and I ______ in the same school.

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-be动词
questions.content: 听句子，判断主语是单数还是复数。
questions.explanation: 录音中说 They are happy，主语 they 复数。
questions.audio_text: They are happy in the park

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-be动词
questions.content: ______ you a student? — Yes, I am.
questions.explanation: 主语 you 用 are，疑问句 Are you...。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-实义动词
questions.content: She ______ to school every day.
questions.explanation: 第三人称单数 + every day → goes。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-实义动词
questions.content: My father ______ TV after dinner.

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-实义动词
questions.content: 动词第三人称单数：study → ______
questions.explanation: 辅音字母 + y 结尾，变 y 为 i 加 es。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-实义动词
questions.content: 动词第三人称单数：have → ______

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-实义动词
questions.content: What ______ Tom usually do on Sundays?
questions.explanation: 主语 Tom 第三人称单数，助动词用 does。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-实义动词
questions.content: I ______ English every morning.
questions.explanation: 主语 I，动词原形 read。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-实义动词
questions.content: 听句子，选出动词的正确形式。
questions.explanation: 录音中 He plays football，第三人称单数。
questions.audio_text: He plays football every Saturday

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-实义动词
questions.content: Lily and Tom ______ Chinese food.（喜欢）
questions.explanation: 复数主语用动词原形 like。

questions.content: Look! The boys ______ basketball on the playground.
questions.explanation: Look! 提示进行时；boys 复数 are playing。

questions.content: 现在分词：run → ______
questions.explanation: 重读闭音节双写 n + ing。

questions.content: 现在分词：swim → ______
questions.explanation: 重读闭音节双写 m + ing。

questions.content: She ______ a book now.
questions.explanation: now 提示进行时，she is reading。

questions.content: ______ you ______ your homework now?
questions.explanation: now 进行时疑问句：Are you doing。

questions.content: 现在分词：write → ______
听录音，回答正在做什么。
questions.explanation: 录音明确说 reading a book。
questions.audio_text: What is Lily doing? She is reading a book in her room

questions.content: 辨析：They ______ TV every evening, but now they ______ a film.
questions.explanation: every evening 一般现在时；now 现在进行时。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-be动词
questions.content: Yesterday I ______ at home.
questions.explanation: yesterday 过去时，I 用 was。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-be动词
questions.content: We ______ in the park last Sunday.

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-be动词
questions.content: 填空：He ______ ill yesterday.（be 的过去式）

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-be动词
questions.content: There ______ many people in the shop yesterday.
questions.explanation: many people 复数 + 过去 → were。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-be动词
questions.content: ______ you at school last Friday?
questions.explanation: 主语 you 过去时疑问句 Were。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-be动词
questions.content: 填空：They ______ happy at the party last night.

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-be动词
questions.content: She ______ a doctor ten years ago.
questions.explanation: ten years ago 过去；she 单数 was。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-be动词
questions.content: 听句子，判断时态。
questions.explanation: 录音中 was 表示过去。
questions.audio_text: It was sunny yesterday

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: We ______ to the museum last Sunday.

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: 动词过去式：see → ______

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: 动词过去式：buy → ______

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: He ______ his homework yesterday evening.

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: Did she ______ to the park yesterday?
questions.explanation: Did 之后用动词原形 go。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: 动词过去式：have → ______

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: I ______ TV last night, and then I ______ to bed.

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: 听句子，回答听到的过去式动词。
questions.audio_text: Last weekend I visited my grandma in the village

questions.content: 选出语序正确的陈述句：
options: A. I have a new bike.
B. Have I a new bike.
C. A new bike I have.
D. Bike a new have I.
questions.explanation: 陈述句基本语序：主+谓+宾。

questions.content: 选出最自然的肯定陈述句：
options: A. He do his homework now.
B. He does homework now do.
C. He is doing his homework now.
questions.explanation: now 配进行时；C 语法正确。

questions.content: 改写为陈述句：Are you a teacher? → ______ are a teacher.
questions.explanation: 疑问句变陈述：Are you → You are，首词 You。

questions.content: 选出语序正确的句子：
questions.explanation: 频度副词 always 位于 be 动词后。

questions.content: 把下列单词排成句子：play / they / football / often.（首字母大写）
questions.explanation: 频度副词 often 位于实义动词前。

questions.content: 选出最佳陈述句：
options: A. The weather sunny is today.
B. Sunny is the weather today.
D. The weather is sunny today.
questions.explanation: 主+系+表，The weather is sunny today。

questions.content: 听句子，选择听到的陈述句。
questions.audio_text: She likes oranges very much

questions.content: 「我们每天上学。」最贴切的英文是：
options: A. We go to school every day.
B. We to school go every day.
C. Every day school we go.
D. Go we every day to school.

questions.content: 改一般疑问句：He likes apples. → ______ he like apples?
questions.explanation: 第三人称单数助动词 Does + 原形。

questions.content: 改一般疑问句：They are students. → ______ they students?
questions.explanation: 陈述句变疑问句把 are 提前 → Are they。

questions.content: 选择正确的回答：— Is your mother a nurse? — ______
questions.explanation: be 动词疑问句 Yes/No 回答用相应的 be。

questions.content: Did you ______ to the cinema yesterday?
听问句，选择恰当的回答。
questions.explanation: 问句 Do you like? → 答 Yes, I do。
questions.audio_text: Do you like ice cream

questions.content: ______ Lily reading a book now?
questions.explanation: now 进行时单数主语用 Is。

questions.content: Were you at school last Monday?  ——  No, I ______ . （be 的过去式否定，不缩写）
questions.explanation: 主语 I 配 was，否定 was not（题目要求不缩写）。

questions.content: 改一般疑问句：She can swim. → ______ she swim?
questions.explanation: 情态动词疑问句把 can 提前。

questions.content: ______ is your name? — My name is Lily.
______ are you? — I am ten.
______ do you go to school? — On foot.
______ is the bird? — On the tree.
______ is your birthday? — May 7th.
听问题，选择正确答案。
questions.explanation: 问 How old → 回答年龄。
questions.audio_text: How old are you, my friend

questions.content: 对划线部分提问：He is reading a book. (划 a book)
questions.explanation: 对宾语 a book 提问用 What。

questions.content: ______ are you crying? — Because I lost my pen.
questions.explanation: 问原因用 Why，回答 Because。

questions.content: He likes football. 否定句：He ______ ______ football.
questions.explanation: 第三人称单数否定 doesn't + 原形。注此为整体短语；选项整体作答。

questions.content: 选出正确的否定句：
options: B. I am not like apples.
C. I do not like apples.
questions.explanation: 实义动词否定用 do not + 原形。

questions.content: She is at home. 改否定：She ______ at home.（不缩写，两个词）
选出正确的否定句：They ______ to the park yesterday.
questions.explanation: 过去时否定 did not + 原形。

questions.content: There are some apples on the table. 否定：There ______ ______ apples.
questions.explanation: some 在否定句变 any，be 动词后加 not。

questions.content: He can speak French. 否定：He ______ speak French.
questions.explanation: 情态动词 can 否定 cannot/can not。

questions.content: 听句子，判断是肯定句还是否定句。
questions.explanation: 录音 I do not like… 是否定句。
questions.audio_text: I do not like cold weather

questions.content: We are watching TV. 改否定：We ______ ______ TV.
questions.explanation: 进行时否定 be + not + V-ing。

questions.content: There ______ a book on the desk.
questions.explanation: 单数 a book 用 is。

questions.content: There ______ many students in the classroom.
填空：There ______ some milk in the bottle.
There ______ a pen and two books on the desk.
questions.explanation: 就近原则 a pen 单数 → is。

questions.content: 改一般疑问句：There are some apples on the table. → ______ ______ ______ apples on the table?
questions.explanation: some 在疑问句变 any；apples 复数 are。

questions.content: Yesterday there ______ a big party at school.
questions.explanation: yesterday 过去；party 单数 was。

questions.content: 听句子，判断有几只猫。
questions.audio_text: There are three cats under the tree

questions.content: There ______ no water in the cup.
questions.explanation: water 不可数 is；no = not any。

questions.content: — Good morning! — ______
— How are you? — ______
questions.explanation: 问候健康，常用 I'm fine, thank you。

questions.content: 听对话，回答问题：他们什么时间见面？
questions.explanation: 录音 Good afternoon 表明下午。
questions.audio_text: A: Good afternoon, Lily. B: Good afternoon, Tom

questions.content: 听对话，B 准备做什么？
questions.explanation: 说 Good night 表示要睡觉。
questions.audio_text: A: It's late. Good night, Mum. B: Good night, dear. Sweet dreams

questions.content: — Goodbye, Lily! — ______
听对话，A 和 B 是什么关系？
questions.explanation: 互相喊名字、打招呼上学，是同学。
questions.audio_text: A: Hi, Tom! B: Hi, Lily! Are you ready for class? A: Yes, let's go

questions.content: — See you tomorrow! — ______
听短对话，根据问候判断时间段。
questions.audio_text: A: Good morning, Mr. Black. B: Good morning, Lily. Have a nice day

questions.content: 听问候，选择最佳回应。
options: B. Nice to meet you, too.
questions.explanation: Nice to meet you 的标准回应。
questions.audio_text: Hello, this is my new friend, Anna. Nice to meet you

questions.content: 「再见，明天见。」最贴切的英文是：
questions.explanation: 标准告别 + 明天 tomorrow。

questions.content: — What's your name? — ______
questions.explanation: 问名字回答 My name is...。

questions.content: — ______ your father? — He is a doctor.
questions.explanation: 问职业用 What's...do? 这里 What is = What's。

questions.content: 听对话，男孩多大？
questions.audio_text: A: How old are you, Tom? B: I'm eleven years old

questions.content: 听对话，女孩来自哪里？
questions.audio_text: A: Where are you from, Lily? B: I'm from China. I live in Beijing

questions.content: — Where are you from? — ______
听对话，回答 Tom 的爱好是什么？
questions.explanation: 录音 He likes playing football。
questions.audio_text: A: What does Tom like? B: He likes playing football very much

questions.content: — ______ that woman? — She is my aunt.
听对话，男孩在哪里？
questions.audio_text: A: Hi Mum, where are you? B: I'm at home. Where are you, Tom? A: I'm in the park

questions.content: 听对话，他们在谈论谁？
questions.explanation: 录音 our new classmate Anna。
questions.audio_text: A: Look! Who is that girl? B: She is our new classmate, Anna. She is from England

questions.content: 「这是我的朋友 Tim。」最贴切的英文是：
options: B. This is my friend, Tim.

questions.content: — Can I help you? — ______
options: C. No, thank you very much I.

questions.content: 听对话，顾客想买什么？
questions.audio_text: A: Can I help you? B: Yes, I want a T-shirt for my son

questions.content: — ______ I borrow your pen? — Sure, here you are.
听对话，B 答应帮忙做什么？
questions.audio_text: A: Excuse me, could you help me carry these books? B: Sure, no problem

questions.content: — Thank you very much! — ______
听对话，男孩需要什么帮助？
questions.audio_text: A: Mum, I can't find my schoolbag. Can you help me? B: Sure, let's look for it together

questions.content: — Would you like some tea? — ______, please.
听对话，B 拒绝了吗？
questions.audio_text: A: Would you like some coffee? B: No, thanks. I don't drink coffee

questions.content: 「请把盐递给我。」最贴切的英文是：
options: A. Pass me the salt, please.
C. Take me to the salt.
D. Give the salt me please.
questions.explanation: 请求语句 Pass me + sth, please。

questions.content: 听对话，需要帮忙搬什么？
questions.audio_text: A: Can you help me move this box? It's heavy. B: Of course, let me help you

questions.content: — Do you like singing? — Yes, I ______.
questions.explanation: 助动词 do 的简短回答。

questions.content: 听对话，女孩喜欢什么科目？
questions.audio_text: A: What's your favourite subject, Lily? B: My favourite subject is English. I love it

questions.content: 「我最喜欢的水果是芒果。」选出最贴切的英文：
options: B. My favourite fruit is mango.
C. The most fruit I like mango.

questions.content: 听对话，男孩讨厌什么？
questions.audio_text: A: Do you like spiders? B: No, I hate them. I'm afraid of spiders

questions.content: — What's your hobby? — ______
questions.explanation: 问爱好回答 I like + V-ing。

questions.content: 听短文，演讲者最爱的运动是？
questions.audio_text: Hi, I'm Tom. I love many sports, but my favourite is swimming. I swim every weekend

questions.content: I prefer apples ______ bananas.（更喜欢苹果而不是香蕉）
听对话，他们打算看什么类型的电影？
questions.audio_text: A: What movie do you want to watch tonight? B: I want to watch a cartoon. I love cartoons

questions.content: — Which colour do you like better, red ______ blue?
听对话，妈妈做了哪个孩子的喜爱菜？
questions.explanation: 录音 my brother's favourite, my younger brother。
questions.audio_text: A: Wow, fried chicken! B: Yes, it's your younger brother's favourite. He'll be happy tonight

questions.content:
阅读短文，回答问题。

Lily is a 12-year-old girl from Beijing. Every morning she gets up at 6:30. She has bread and milk for breakfast. She goes to school by bike. She has four classes in the morning and two in the afternoon. After school, she often plays badminton with her friends. On weekends, she likes reading books and helping her mum with the housework.

1. How old is Lily?

阅读短文，回答问题。

Lily is a 12-year-old girl from Beijing. Every morning she gets up at 6:30. She has bread and milk for breakfast. She goes to school by bike. She has four classes in the morning and two in the afternoon. After school, she often plays badminton with her friends. On weekends, she likes reading books and helping her mum with the housework.

2. What does Lily have for breakfast?

阅读短文，回答问题。

Lily is a 12-year-old girl from Beijing. Every morning she gets up at 6:30. She has bread and milk for breakfast. She goes to school by bike. She has four classes in the morning and two in the afternoon. After school, she often plays badminton with her friends. On weekends, she likes reading books and helping her mum with the housework.

3. How does Lily go to school?

阅读短文，回答问题。

Lily is a 12-year-old girl from Beijing. Every morning she gets up at 6:30. She has bread and milk for breakfast. She goes to school by bike. She has four classes in the morning and two in the afternoon. After school, she often plays badminton with her friends. On weekends, she likes reading books and helping her mum with the housework.

4. What does Lily like doing on weekends?
options: C. reading and helping with housework
questions.explanation: 原文 likes reading books and helping her mum with the housework。

questions.content:
阅读短文，回答问题。

It was Sunday yesterday. Tom and his family went to the park near their home. They went there by car. The weather was sunny. In the park, Tom flew a kite with his father. His mother sat under a tree and read a book. Tom's little sister, Amy, played with a ball. They had lunch in the park. Tom ate a hamburger and Amy ate a hot dog. They went home at 5 o'clock. They were tired but happy.

1. When did Tom's family go to the park?
questions.explanation: 原文 It was Sunday yesterday。

questions.content:
阅读短文，回答问题。

It was Sunday yesterday. Tom and his family went to the park near their home. They went there by car. The weather was sunny. In the park, Tom flew a kite with his father. His mother sat under a tree and read a book. Tom's little sister, Amy, played with a ball. They had lunch in the park. Tom ate a hamburger and Amy ate a hot dog. They went home at 5 o'clock. They were tired but happy.

2. How was the weather?
questions.explanation: 原文 The weather was sunny。

questions.content:
阅读短文，回答问题。

It was Sunday yesterday. Tom and his family went to the park near their home. They went there by car. The weather was sunny. In the park, Tom flew a kite with his father. His mother sat under a tree and read a book. Tom's little sister, Amy, played with a ball. They had lunch in the park. Tom ate a hamburger and Amy ate a hot dog. They went home at 5 o'clock. They were tired but happy.

3. Who flew the kite with Tom?
questions.explanation: 原文 flew a kite with his father。

questions.content:
阅读短文，回答问题。

It was Sunday yesterday. Tom and his family went to the park near their home. They went there by car. The weather was sunny. In the park, Tom flew a kite with his father. His mother sat under a tree and read a book. Tom's little sister, Amy, played with a ball. They had lunch in the park. Tom ate a hamburger and Amy ate a hot dog. They went home at 5 o'clock. They were tired but happy.

4. What did Amy eat for lunch?
questions.explanation: 原文 Amy ate a hot dog。

My name is Anna. I have a new friend. Her name is Linda. She is from Australia. She is eleven years old. She has long brown hair and big blue eyes. She likes maths and PE. She is good at swimming. After school, we often go to the library together to do our homework.

1. Where is Linda from?

questions.content: 听短文，回答问题：男孩名字叫什么？
questions.explanation: 录音首句 My name is Jack。
questions.audio_text: My name is Jack. I am ten years old. I am from London. I have a sister. Her name is Sue. We are very happy

questions.content: 听上面的短文，男孩多大？
questions.audio_text: My name is Jack. I am ten years old. I am from London. I have a sister. Her name is Sue. We are very happy

questions.content: 听上面的短文，他来自哪里？
questions.audio_text: My name is Jack. I am ten years old. I am from London. I have a sister. Her name is Sue. We are very happy

questions.content: 听对话，顾客点了几样东西？
questions.explanation: 面条、橙汁、蛋糕共 3 样。
questions.audio_text: Waiter: Good evening. May I take your order? Customer: Yes, I'd like a bowl of noodles and a glass of orange juice, please. Waiter: Anything else? Customer: A piece of cake, please. Waiter: OK, please wait a moment

questions.content: 听上面的对话，顾客没有点哪样？
questions.audio_text: Waiter: Good evening. May I take your order? Customer: Yes, I'd like a bowl of noodles and a glass of orange juice, please. Waiter: Anything else? Customer: A piece of cake, please. Waiter: OK, please wait a moment

questions.content: 听上面的对话，他们在哪里？
questions.explanation: 服务员 + 点单，是餐厅。
questions.audio_text: Waiter: Good evening. May I take your order? Customer: Yes, I'd like a bowl of noodles and a glass of orange juice, please. Waiter: Anything else? Customer: A piece of cake, please. Waiter: OK, please wait a moment

questions.content: 听天气预报，星期一天气如何？
questions.audio_text: Hello, everyone. This is the weather report for this week. On Monday, it will be sunny and hot. On Tuesday and Wednesday, it will rain. On Thursday, it will be cloudy. On Friday, the weather will be sunny again. Have a nice week

questions.content: 听上面的天气预报，哪几天会下雨？
questions.explanation: Tuesday and Wednesday it will rain。
questions.audio_text: Hello, everyone. This is the weather report for this week. On Monday, it will be sunny and hot. On Tuesday and Wednesday, it will rain. On Thursday, it will be cloudy. On Friday, the weather will be sunny again. Have a nice week

questions.content: 听对话，问路人要去哪里？
questions.audio_text: Excuse me, where is the bookshop? Go straight along this street, then turn left at the second crossing. The bookshop is on your right, next to a big supermarket. It's about five minutes' walk. You can't miss it

questions.content: 听上面的对话，第二个路口要怎么走？
questions.explanation: turn left at the second crossing。
questions.audio_text: Excuse me, where is the bookshop? Go straight along this street, then turn left at the second crossing. The bookshop is on your right, next to a big supermarket. It's about five minutes' walk. You can't miss it

questions.content: 听对话，T 恤多少钱？
questions.audio_text: A: Excuse me, how much is this T-shirt? B: It's 50 yuan. A: Do you have a smaller size? B: Yes, here you are. A: I'll take it. Here is 100 yuan. B: Thank you. Here is your change, 50 yuan

questions.content: 听上面的对话，顾客找回多少钱？

questions.content:
选择能填入空白处的最佳选项：
My father is a teacher. He ______ English at a middle school. He likes his work very much.

选择正确的句子顺序构成一段对话：
① I'm twelve. ② How old are you? ③ Hi, my name is Tom. ④ Hi, I'm Lily.
questions.explanation: 自我介绍→打招呼→问年龄→回答。

questions.content:
短文判断：

It is summer now. The weather is hot. We often go swimming. We eat a lot of ice cream.

判断：『The weather is cold.』 这句话是______。
questions.explanation: 原文 The weather is hot 与之相反。

questions.content: 完成句子：If it ______ tomorrow, we will not have a picnic.
questions.explanation: if 引导条件状语从句，主将从现，rains。

questions.content:
阅读句子，选择 it 指代的事物：
The book is on the desk. It is mine.

短文配标题：

In spring, the trees are green. Flowers come out. Birds come back. Children fly kites in the park.
